subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 5: Speaking
description: Thảo luận về ứng dụng AI

theory.title: Speaking: Discussing AI and Its Applications

sections.heading: Speaking Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Discussing AI and its applications

Kỹ năng nói:

  • Talking about AI applications: Nói về ứng dụng AI
  • Describing how AI works: Mô tả cách AI hoạt động
  • Discussing benefits and concerns: Thảo luận lợi ích và lo ngại
  • Expressing opinions: Bày tỏ ý kiến
  • Using causative forms: Sử dụng thể sai khiến

Useful expressions:

  • Talking about AI use:
  • I use AI to...
  • I have Siri set reminders.
  • I get AI to translate documents.
  • AI helps me...
  • I have my phone recognize my face.
  • Describing AI functions:
  • AI can...
  • AI is used to...
  • AI works by...
  • AI analyzes/processes/recognizes...
  • Discussing benefits:
  • One benefit of AI is...
  • AI makes life more convenient.
  • AI helps us...
  • Thanks to AI, we can...
  • Expressing concerns:
  • However, AI raises concerns about...
  • I'm worried that...
  • One problem with AI is...
  • We need to be careful about...
  • Giving opinions:
  • In my opinion, AI...
  • I think/believe that...
  • From my perspective...
  • I agree/disagree that...

sections.heading: Talking About AI Applications
sections.content:
Common AI applications:

  • Virtual assistants: Siri, Alexa, Google Assistant
  • Facial recognition: unlocking phones, security systems
  • Recommendation systems: YouTube, Netflix, Amazon
  • Translation: Google Translate
  • Autonomous vehicles: self-driving cars
  • Healthcare: medical diagnosis, drug discovery
  • Education: personalized learning, chatbots

Describing AI benefits:

  • Efficiency: AI works faster than humans
  • Accuracy: AI makes fewer mistakes
  • Convenience: AI makes life easier
  • 24/7 availability: AI never sleeps
  • Cost-effective: AI can reduce costs

Discussing AI concerns:

  • Job loss: AI may replace workers
  • Privacy: AI collects personal data
  • Ethics: AI decision-making raises questions
  • Dependence: We rely too much on technology
  • Bias: AI can reflect human biases

exercises.question: Which expression is used to talk about AI use?
exercises.explanation: 'I have Siri set reminders' sử dụng thể sai khiến để nói về việc dùng AI.

exercises.question: Complete: 'I _____ AI to translate documents.'
exercises.explanation: 'Get' phù hợp: get + O + to V (AI to translate).

exercises.question: Which phrase expresses a concern?
options: I'm worried that AI may replace workers
exercises.explanation: 'I'm worried that...' thể hiện lo ngại.

exercises.question: Complete: 'One benefit of AI is that it makes life more _____.'
exercises.explanation: 'Convenient' (tiện lợi) là lợi ích của AI.

exercises.question: Which is a virtual assistant?
exercises.explanation: Siri là trợ lý ảo (virtual assistant).

exercises.question: Complete: 'I _____ my phone _____ my face.'
exercises.explanation: Have...recognize - thể sai khiến: have + O + V.

exercises.question: Which describes an AI benefit?
exercises.explanation: 'Efficient' (hiệu quả) là lợi ích của AI.

exercises.question: Complete: 'In my opinion, AI _____ be used responsibly.'
exercises.explanation: 'Should' thể hiện ý kiến rằng AI nên được sử dụng có trách nhiệm.

exercises.question: What is a concern about AI?
exercises.explanation: Lo ngại về AI bao gồm riêng tư và mất việc làm.

exercises.question: Complete: 'AI _____ by analyzing data.'
exercises.explanation: 'Works' là động từ ngôi thứ 3 số ít phù hợp với 'AI'.

exercises.question: Which is an AI application?
exercises.explanation: Facial recognition (nhận dạng khuôn mặt) là ứng dụng AI.

exercises.question: Complete: 'From my _____, AI will change the future.'
exercises.explanation: 'From my perspective' nghĩa là theo quan điểm của tôi.

exercises.question: What does 'autonomous vehicle' mean?
exercises.explanation: Autonomous vehicle là xe tự lái.

exercises.question: Complete: 'We need to be careful _____ privacy issues.'
exercises.explanation: 'Be careful about' là cụm từ đúng.

exercises.question: Which phrase discusses AI benefits?
options: Thanks to AI, we can work more efficiently
exercises.explanation: 'Thanks to AI, we can...' thảo luận về lợi ích.

exercises.question_text: Decide which are good ways to discuss AI (True/False):
options: I have Siri set reminders for me.
One benefit of AI is efficiency.
AI has no concerns at all.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cách tốt dùng thể sai khiến. b) False - Quá tiêu cực. c) True - Thảo luận lợi ích đúng. d) False - AI có nhiều lo ngại.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the expression is correct:
options: I get AI to translate documents.
AI works by to analyze data.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Đúng cấu trúc get + O + to V. b) False - Phải là 'makes'. c) True - Đúng cấu trúc. d) False - Phải là 'by analyzing'.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I have my phone _____ my face. (recognize/recognizes)
exercises.explanation: Have + O + V (bare infinitive) - thể sai khiến.

exercises.question_text: Complete the phrase: virtual _____ (related to Siri, Alexa)
exercises.explanation: 'Virtual assistant' - trợ lý ảo.
AI làm cuộc sống tiện lợi hơn (convenient).
